intent: 2-STOREY 3BR narrow side-spine-stair smoke test on the canonical 9x13 lot, no carport. 5x9 envelope per floor (45 m² footprint, 90 m² gross — in the 3BR/2-bath 80-120 band). Exercises three bedrooms above a 5 m-wide floor: master full-width front, stairwell + landing hall as the left/mid circulation spine, br2 mid-right, br3 rear; the GF kitchen-as-rear-column trick preserving the dining-counter seam on a deep hall-less floor; and the dead-strip rectangle decomposition (the kitchen claims the rear-left rect as an L-pantry).
must_haves: all three bedrooms upstairs, each with an exterior wall
circulation as a compact side spine, not a full-width corridor
kitchen column at the rear keeping the dining counter seam
